generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder located behind the gearbox of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionData
]

instance Sinumerik840DController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller providing motor current, position, speed, and acceleration data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData, SinumerikPositionData, SinumerikSpeedData, SinumerikAccelerationData
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Sinumerik840DController
]

instance SinumerikPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Sinumerik840DController
]

instance SinumerikSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Sinumerik840DController
]

instance SinumerikAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Sinumerik840DController
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance MotorCurrentDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current (I_M) data trace with traceable computation origins"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance SinumerikPositionDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from SINUMERIK controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SinumerikPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance SinumerikSpeedDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Speed data from SINUMERIK controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SinumerikSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance SinumerikAccelerationDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration data from SINUMERIK controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SinumerikAccelerationData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance TorqueDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated torque (τ) from motor current data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Computed angular velocity (ω) from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis structural model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis structural model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorGearboxDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for motor and gearbox dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Stribeck friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Dahl friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box LuGre friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical robot to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling for structural representation of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulating motor and gearbox dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for integrated robot motion analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and black-box models combined with live operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionDynamicsInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization in a unified dashboard to enhance robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyInsight
]

instance FrictionDynamicsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into joint friction dynamics for improving robot motion control accuracy"
]

instance MotionAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into robot motion accuracy improvement through parameter updates based on model comparisons"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming with no specific frequency specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A passive digital shadow structure integrating SysML structural models, Simulink behavioral simulations, and MQTT-streamed sensor data into a unified dashboard for friction analysis, with one-way data flow from physical robot to virtual representation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated (real-time operational phase during robot motion control)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data against measured reference values, with friction models validated against real-world operational data for accuracy and deviation analysis."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for secure, lightweight sensor data streaming from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards for industrial assets and SysML for system modeling."
]
